home.metaDescription: Hôtel 4 étoiles indépendant à Toulouse : 90 chambres et suites, amphithéâtre de 285 places, 13 salles de réunion, restaurant, spa et piscine extérieure.
home.introText: Le Palladia, hôtel 4 étoiles indépendant à Toulouse, dispose de 90 chambres et suites spacieuses, un amphithéâtre de 285 places, 13 salles de réunion à la lumière du jour, un bar-lounge cosy, un restaurant traditionnel, une piscine extérieure et d'un espace dédié au bien-être.
home.trouverText: The Hotel Palladia is the ideal place for a professional business stay or a romantic getaway in Occitanie.
home.sejourText: Each room is carefully crafted with a distinctive aesthetic vision, creating an atmosphere that is both sophisticated and welcoming. Our four room categories offer a variety of options to suit all your preferences and requirements.
home.chambresCta: The flavours on our menu change with the seasons, offering a refined culinary experience. Our chef prepares dishes using carefully selected fresh ingredients.
home.restaurantCta: Explore this haven dedicated to escape. It's important to note that our Spa welcomes not only guests of the Hotel Palladia, but also all lovers of relaxation looking for an exclusive experience.
home.spaCta: The Hôtel Palladia boasts a 285-seat amphitheatre, a unique feature in Toulouse.
home.sallesTitle: For your meetings, 13 rooms bathed in natural light.
home.sallesText: L'Hôtel Palladia se distingue par son amphithéâtre de 285 places : une exclusivité à Toulouse. Pour vos réunions, 13 salles baignées par la lumière naturelle.
home.sallesCta: Our team can provide you with reception rooms for the happiest day of your life. The rooms can be hired over two days to extend the festivities with a brunch the following day.
home.mariagesCta: The contemporary character of the Hotel Palladia is exemplified by its vibrant celebration of cultural diversity, embodied in an eclectic and fascinating range of arts. The Palladia offers spellbinding performances of classical music and theatre.
home.suitesCta: Discover our hotel on video: lobby, rooms, outdoor swimming pool, amphitheatre, meeting rooms, bar and restaurant.
home.videoText: Treat yourself or someone else! Choose from our range of gift boxes
home.coffretsText: Le Palladia also puts on shows all year round

footer.creation: To provide the best experiences, we use technologies such as cookies to store and/or access device information. Consenting to these technologies will allow us to process data such as browsing behaviour or unique IDs on this site. Failure to consent or withdrawal of consent may adversely affect certain features and functions.
